h5d788adfg914bg437cg8d5fge25d5b461969: Hello, petal! Need anything? Any lotions or potions?
hb824b562g136fg4b89gabedg4abf71b9eb88: I need help. I've been infected by a mind flayer parasite.
h0dba491cgcbe2g4195g80f4g2fe0ceb75660: Lotions and potions for all ail - Oh, no!
h3ef1dc7bg2291g4068g9bc0g0e266f27cb51: Those ears are practically drooping, dearie! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
hd2874801g5545g40f2g8ae7g8a9ebfb029b1: Your cheeks aren't nearly ruddy enough, dearie! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h022de3b5g6acfg4426gbe5cgef87c88de677: You look more green then yellow, dearie! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h9b87d198ga94cg4ab8ga79dg4d826d0654f9: There isn't a bit of colour in those cheeks, dearie! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h41be4839gd778g4dd8gaed7gde029e310fe3: Your cheeks, at least, what I reckon are your cheeks, look a little flushed, love. Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h5185c6afgc943g4b89gb6c6ge6fb5faf4332: There's an awful slump to those broad shoulders of yours, petal. Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
hbbd7a1d7gba1fg43f4ga4b3gc1260ea4d2b9: I have a... condition. But it's complicated.
hc3f0da5bg85dcg4d49gb371g9f69308978e1: Ah, if it isn't the talk o' the camp?
ha9f5feb0g747eg4770g9c49ge1afa11b74a0: Thank goodness you came along when you - oh!
h10859c70g78fcg4c44g8216gded622eaa91c: It's a rare day I see one of you lot about. Thank goodness you came along when you - oh!
h8d30c57bg0b79g4d5bgb075gc109fb08a0a0: Interesting to see you strutting about in the sun. Ain't seen that before, and Auntie Ethel's seen her fair share.
h67680315g85b9g4d71ga85bgbf2b93c8b921: Still, you're looking a little pasty, love. I've just the thing to perk you up.
h175acd9fgfc17g42fbgaaaag8bad4c98b051: There's no need. I'm fine, really.
h6274356dg743dg4af4gb6cdg03dee46a0698: Sorry, love. I just lose the run of myself sometimes.
h10aa2578gf19bg41d3ga01cg3286e56e7587: I must say, though - you're looking mighty peaky.
h4fde6016gbf69g488bg869cge6b0f061997e: I've been better. It's... difficult to explain.
h58a4bed2g967ag442cgb683ge92244784e44: I once had a fella who'd been caught dabbling with a dryad.
hf5b2d2d0ga7b9g4b5eg841ag73e5d14162c8: The wife was none too pleased and introduced him to a pot of boiling oil.
hd8b1910eg50f9g4ba6g9347g48c016e90db1: But worry not! I fixed him up and, depending on the lighting, he looks good as new!
hb2f543aeg9befg4921g860cgca797ca4af73: My point is - whatever ails you... I promise I've seen worse.
hb75d766eg9d6ag4f3cgb5abg536990f10ca8: She is not to know of the... our ailment. Only a gith caretaker may make us pure.
h35fe1c34gda7bg4646g8fd7gfc9afcde3939: What is it, petal? What's wrong?
h33bf32d7g79b7g42abgaf4ag4ef4de060b4b: I've got a mind flayer parasite in my head.
hc7daa7e2gfbfag4a09ga7f1gc01805937446: *As you recount your adventure, Auntie Ethel nods along - her eyes wide.*
h247ab5e9g967cg4878g97a7gef39b38c4931: You poor pet. My heart goes out to you, truly.
h9c4e4db8g53c4g4913gad93g27f406f8350b: I see no sign of a tentacle yet, but that could change in an instant. You need help, serious help.
h6865d683gcda0g4209g96f7g2d41d2032b8c: I've ne'er a potion or lotion here that could do it, but...
hb8546737g9e3dg49a8g9e63g4d7c462500ea: ...yes. I may have something at home!
hea7ccd85g1109g4e00g8475g13e2fd2a6a88: I've collected some... interesting bits 'n' bobs over the years.
h7f6eac9bgf59eg4d31gae0fg969275735c12: You'll have to stop by my house - just at the edge of the forest!
h18b50c16g7460g4a08g8621g10afd00a9662: Let me mark it on your map. I'll be heading back soon, so I can meet you there.
hd2b0da1ag8eb5g4503g9d56ga0500a95010b: Oh, and those potions you swiped from me? Keep them - call it a gift from your Auntie Ethel.
h8e8fd088g5467g4cf9g8be0gd892674266ce: My time could be running short. I can't afford to spend it paying you a house visit.
h0a757c90g831ag44b9g80e4g2d40a76d0fc3: I'm sorry, but I can't do much for you here. You could try asking around, but be careful.
h98db8742g654fg4c01ga74ag419b401d3696: Most folk won't be as understanding of your little... problem.
h1fc2311bg8c62g43d5g9a90g79d5820e2687: I'll be heading home soon. Here. Let me mark it on your map - just in case.
h89fb7745g03a1g46beg8a56g0d4cb954118f: That's precious little use to me, is it?
hba8e6b58g023eg4395gbaf5gc88b4dae020c: Why don't you pop by, and we can have a little chat about it? I do love me a handsome gentleman caller.
h78e8db76ga83fg4b9fg8f59g4cf93399136e: Especially if he has a... tentacle issue.
h9a1b6b32g5628g46afgbed2g867849bc44fa: I can't waste time on 'may' or 'might'.
hf015108cga0dfg498ag9f06g4cad3f36ef81: Have a little faith in your Auntie Ethel, sweetie. I've got a few tricks up my sleeve yet.
hbd646dabg9eb0g4605g8ef2g64e2c538f587: That is a gracious offer, but I need an expert's help.
h14806cc9gc434g4f5cgbfe0g37dc86d1488c: Expert? Pfft. I'm more reliable than any of those eejits with 'credentials'.
h9ef43111g76a4g4afega5b8gf3feb2d15f77: No cure you offer can provide effective purification.
hb0ec5aa6gbc51g45e5g882cg4b66e8a7ea05: Stop by my place, petal. It'll be worth your while - I promise.
heb515005g11b2g4c65g8138g44aa8e3aa2b5: This is beyond the skills of a backwater herb peddler.
he7bd416fg1de7g4634gb706g0daffa95c955: Hah! I'm far more than a peddler, dearie. Surprised I had to spell it out - I thought you the observant sort.
ha487d461g813cg43ddgadadgc8aeb08f3e54: Does anyone fall for this innocent old lady act?
he9473ddcge2a5g45ceg9206gf8abb586170b: Hah! I'm far from innocent, petal. I was raising hell when you were still a spark in your mammy's eye.
haf0f5defg6c32g40d6gaf29gb66091e3876f: Drop by for a visit, and I'll have a pot brewing. We can chat over a cuppa while I sort you out.
hd06ab068g104ag4fbdga4d0g32871de7e0e5: I doubt a simple potion will suffice. This problem calls for strong magic.
h7cf6497cgaa89g4371g90e4gbe705bfa0461: Petal, the things I've collected would blow your pretty little mind.
h877bcd85gcd79g4bc1ga261g1a59387880bc: Bracelets that hold the power of ten men, mirrors that capture the soul...
he791f2c8gd547g4722gbe8dg20787b6c0c44: Oh? Whatever do you mean, petal?
h1a1cf44cg17e4g4ecfg8c1ag19f578743d67: You have a certain bearing. An almost fey-like quality.
ha78db15bg9d8fg4eeegb330g720cbf7376b7: Fey? I hope you're not calling me a dryad or, bless us and save us, one of those Eladrin - flightly buggers.
hfe921904g50e0g4534g90a0g5e763a148c20: I'm a simple woman, sweetie. Tea and potions are as exciting as it gets for these old bones.
hc8f74c76g139fg4305ga147g9c2c1addc7f3: But enough nattering. I'll be heading home shortly. Here. Let me mark it on your map.
hbc850179g1de8g41b2g856bgbfbf47ecabdb: One condition though - you swipe anything in my home? You'll lose a finger. Don't think I didn't notice.
hc5f995a0g75f1g4288ga9fbg405ed44b3cc5: I'd best get back to it, but you take care now, petal.
h2a650319g57f0g4083ga740gc2922c95a588: Why don't you come see for yourself? My home ain't far and I'll be there sharpish. Here. I'll mark it on your map.
h5423dc13g3c43g4761g863dg35b707084b24: Now, do you need anything? I have a few odds and ends for sale.
hec7408e2gab2eg4e09g9e9egb7240acad570: What harm? Show me your wares.
h02376081g95ecg4714gaba3g9274d6f5d059: Be careful on the road - I'd hate if something happened to you. Take care, petal.
h8e915ec3g2d60g4d49gb535gedd3a30ce50a: Nae bother, love. Come back anytime!
h74e56f5dg142bg4d7ag8ba9g14c67fc71aad: Might you hail from Thay, perhaps?

h854bcd77g8364g4b59gb3fdgf30ef07574fe: There is a touch of the wilds about you.
h6df96be9g23ebg4de4ga339gfa811511c2a8: Hah! I was quite the wild thing back in the day, but I'm afraid that's long past.
h445ed287g2c9ag411fga599gd3aa53722907: Not at all! Wouldn't have the patience for all that magical drama.
h6a140e1fged1fg43c2gb3bcgcaeeac066e29: There's nothing wrong, I swear. Everything's fine.
h209d3bb0g60f6g4306g9c12g3bf5570d46d5: What harm? Show me your wares.
h24843467g03dag4071g99eegeba1f01cd45c: Nae bother, love. By the way, I'll be heading home soon. Be sure to come visit, you hear?
h4040c35fg3ca3g4941g8413g1d308b66e839: Don't get your knickers in a twist. I was only asking.
h4ec6a5ceg4854g4192g87ecgbaf3a205c122: Something doesn't add up about this one. Don't tell her anything.
h747985f2ga835g4d07g8689g5662c61ea797: I hardly think a mad old woman's lotions and potions are going to cure us. We should keep moving.
ha0852829gb505g46eagbd73ga3c5989910b2: I love it! Let's tell her everything.
h87f9ddc1g6c39g4a5egaa05g341dbab180c0: Go on! If she turns sour, we'll give her the slip.
h99cd3901gaa47g4ac1gb8cfgfdf0e0dfe54f: Tell her. But if she pulls out a pot of oil, run!
h1bbd3544g06cdg4fb3ga206g13149c04bf6b: I'm fine. Just bone-weary after a difficult day.
h70f793feg0ca4g4a14g8f73g752c512ac1c1: Oh, stop. Even on a good day, half the camp acts like a bunch of screaming brats.
hfc066b93gfaa9g4d20g8580g3edb4318489f: I'm tempted to smack them all on the backside and tell them to kiss and make up!
hafcec457gab43g40c8ga2d2g56027452ed9a: Not that they'd listen to little 'old me. Anyway! Do you need anything? I have a few odds and ends for sale.
h28bb9cacgabf4g445agb974gaa4cd0340214: You take a sup of that and you'll feel right as rain, sweetie.
h021df518g4f82g44f3ga56bgb72382b6420a: Oh, 'tis just a healing potion. Nothing fancy! Here.
h21e9b85ag4e1eg4a10gb7a6gf27cdf567563: You just look like you might need a pick-me-up.
hef01a262g15a6g4489gbcc0g4156320bbae0: I'm sorry to go on about it, but are you all right? You're looking awful peaky.
haa87f50fg9e73g429eg9d58g5c073c62f8d1: *As you down the potion, a comforting warmth spreads through you.*
h4f011a92gf00cg464egb1cbg643179e0e365: Hmmm. I swear, you're still as peaky looking.
hb58a50b8gb481g4de9g8d29gc5374250956a: Might this concoction also help with something more... serious?
h11c85dc6gb773g45c6gbd4fg0846fa7c768a: Well that depends. What's wrong, lovie?
hbbeb4512gc9dfg4792gba72g205f50133a4d: I'm tired, that's all. It's been a long day.
h86d671bbg51cbg4593g8cc3g79650bc21467: It would be remiss of me to turn down a homemade brew. Thank you kindly.
h6cf36a94g5c24g424ag893bg29d2e4b7ad7e: Oh, stop with the sweet talk. Here. Take the end of the batch. Just in case.
h955ec77eg2a15g49d5ga6e0g3179db7a4bf8: This is an expertly made healing potion. Nicely done.
h279633deg3a9bg44d1ga05dgab51db9a06f0: Oh, nothing as fancy as that!
hef0b0828g61fcg4bdeg9c26g096685916c56: But I come from a long line of women with a dab hand at such things.
h6941ac4cg89abg457cga864g5fa30c247cc3: Well, aren't you a perceptive one, madam?
h83619f66gf402g4b14g9ae0gdc2d073af681: I'm just curious about curiosities, is all. And you seem like quite the curiosity.
hb3250c4dg8ac0g427dgadebg1648566b1bbc: You could be friend or foe. Why should I drink anything you prepare?
h1674bb3dgf418g4b6ag8997g8018de902199: I know githyanki make a habit of paranoia, but 'tis just a healing potion.
h990ae8d7gae27g4216gbbd2g745fe8f3d769: A being like you knows of the gith?
he219f879g5846g4adaga784g18c1aa14f1f8: Yes, and you're as grumpy as I remember. No offence, love but...
h767b66dag87f6g4a73gb540g98e6700a6516: ... you don't look well. Are you all right?
h8c619ec0g4501g4cacg8524gbd1a45980f6d: My health is my concern, not yours.
h252672eag4229g402cgb776g1a18eb00cc80: Ah, don't be grumpy, petal. I only want to help.
hee0db04dg19dag482bgb0d5g9a20ffc9600e: Your cheeks aren't nearly ruddy enough, petal! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?

ha5440ea9g1171g452dgb79bg62f324470e5f: There isn't a bit of colour in those cheeks, petal! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
hf9e8ea02g9bfdg41b1gb03cgcbc6e5b9dbc0: Those ears are practically drooping, petal! Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h07525f90g7a24g4e04g8fc4g0bc4c0f60915: Your cheeks, at least, what I reckon are your cheeks, look a little flushed, love. Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h995b7cfeg985ag4c72ga7d4gccda21b4d85d: There's an awful slump to those broad shoulders of yours, petal. Are you hurt? Cold? Feverish?
h24f10d43g88b9g403dg8c9cgab2aeddb649e: Auntie Ethel will sort you out. I've lotions and potions galore!
